title: Observation of anomalous exciton polariton bands in PEPI perovskite based microcavity at room temperature
author_string: Chunzi Xing, Xiaokun Zhai, Chenxi Yang, Peilin Wang, Jiaxiang Mu et al.
abstract: Recently anomalous energy bands with negative mass attract intensive attention where non Hermiticity plays an important role. In this work we observe anomalous exciton polariton bands in PEPI perovskite based microcavity at room temperature. We simulate the anomalous band structure using a non-Hermitian coupled oscillator model which agree with experiments very well. Our results offer to study non-Hermitian polariton wave dynamics at room temperature.
